item.title: Kallisto Pseudoalignment 작업
item.description: Kallisto Pseudoalignment 작업 # #2025-04-21 1. Build Index # $ kallisto index -i transcripts_cDNA.idx Homo_sapiens.GRCh38.cdna.all.fa.gz # 2. Pseudoalign # $ kallisto quant -i transcripts_cDNA.idx -o output_150-1 -t 40 ../2306_tophat/data/Bowtie2Index/5-AZA_150-1_1_edited.fastq ../2306_tophat/data/Bowtie2Index/5-AZA_150-1_2_edited.fastq 3개 파일 생성 abundance.h5 - HDF5 binary file containing run info, abundance esimates, bootstrap estimates, and transcript length information length. This file can be read in by sleuth abundance.tsv - plaintext file of the abundance estimates. It does not contains bootstrap estimates.
